description: Full 100K steps TAM + recovery loss (convergence training) for OOD robustness evaluation. Replicated from q223 but at full scale with 8 seeds for statistical significance.
notes: Full 100K training with TAM mining + recovery loss. 8 seeds for OOD robustness evaluation baseline. Expected baseline: q220 val_mse=0.009728±0.000016, q223 preliminary success. This run will be used for q226 OOD evaluation.
